series_metadata.series_title: Grant Request Form for Purchases of New Manufacturing Machinery
series_metadata.series_description: Form, provided by the Department, is to be completed by a taxpayer and attached to the IT1040, IT1041, IT4708 and FT 1120.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in files for 4 years, then destroy. If scanned and imaged, shred 6 months after scanning. ; Electronic: Retain 4 yeas, then delete., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
